name: Sand Trap Social
about: Sand Trap Social is a golf simulator venue located in Columbus, GA, offering state-of-the-art indoor golf experiences combined with upscale casual dining and a full-service bar. The facility features four premium Golfzon TwoVision NX simulator bays, allowing golfers to play on 275+ world-famous courses in a climate-controlled environment. Pricing is structured on a per-bay-hour basis with off-peak rates at $45/hour and on-peak rates at $65/hour, accommodating up to 6 players per bay. The venue also offers monthly membership plans for regular patrons looking to save on simulator time and food/beverage costs.
why_golfers_like_it: Golfzon TwoVision NX technology provides accurate ball tracking and realistic course simulation
Climate-controlled indoor environment for year-round play regardless of weather
Combines golf with premium food, craft cocktails, and a sophisticated social atmosphere
Multiple membership options offer discounts on simulator time and dining
Hosts leagues and tournaments for competitive play
Ideal for both practice and full 18-hole rounds on famous courses

food_and_drink.notes: Upscale casual kitchen with comfort food and shareable plates designed for the golf experience
Full-service craft bar with premium spirits, signature golf-themed cocktails, local craft beers on tap, and premium whiskey collection

simulator_hardware.notes: Premium simulator technology with accurate ball tracking, swing analysis, and 275+ world-famous course selection

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: While not explicitly stated, it's assumed you can bring your own clubs as they would be used with the simulators. The venue may also offer club rentals.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No, BYOB (Bring Your Own Beverage) is not mentioned. The venue offers an upscale casual kitchen and full-service craft bar with premium food and drinks.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: While not explicitly stated, a typical 18-hole round on a simulator usually takes 2-3 hours depending on group size and pace of play.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: The venue primarily focuses on an upscale casual atmosphere with craft cocktails and adult-oriented experiences. There's no mention of specific kid-friendly amenities or activities.
